query: real-time MRI guided brachytherapy MRI-linac platform clinical evidence
citations: [Real-time MRI: a new tool of radiologic imaging in small children.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37249681/)

evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 37249681. 2023/08/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Interventional magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) can provide a 
comprehensive setting for microwave ablation of tumors with real-time monitoring 
of t
evidence.source_title: Real-time MRI: a new tool of radiologic imaging in small children.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 37249681. 2023/08/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Interventional magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) can provide a 
comprehensive setting for microwave ablation of tumors with real-time monitoring 
of the energy delivery using MRI-based temperature mapping. The purpose of this 
study was to quantify the accuracy of three-dimensional (3D) real-time MRI 
temperature mapping during microwave heating in vitro by comparing MRI 
thermometry data to reference data measured by fiber-optical thermometry.
M
